events.summary: Phase 0 Research opened 2026-06-04. F16 try-repo pre-commit harness. RICE 48.0 (foundational v7.9.1 test-discipline). FIT-88 Urgent. Research.md captures Q1-Q5 outstanding for Phase 1 PRD: subprocess vs in-process (Q1, lean subprocess), fixture format hybrid (Q2), CI single-job parametrize (Q3), pytest tmp_path cleanup (Q4), gate-coverage env-var override (Q5 new — surfaced during research).

Phase 1 PRD opened 2026-06-04T05:40Z. Q1-Q5 all LOCKED + 4 frozen constants. 8 acceptance criteria. 3 kill criteria + opt-out rollback plan (single-line CI revert). T2-T10 task preview included. Phase 4 implementation ~2.5d wall-clock. Earliest enforced ship 2026-06-18 (T+14d soak).

Phase 2 Tasks opened 2026-06-04T05:50Z. 12-commit breakdown across T2-T10 (~1,720 LOC) + advisory soak T11. Per-fixture pattern + per-test parametrize + Q5 canonical-ledger-untouched assertion all spelled out as code in tasks.md. Deliberate-regression test (T7) design locked. 16 write-time gates enumerated + bucketed into 4 fixture groups.

Phase 4 Implementation opened 2026-06-04T06:10Z. T2 SHIPPED — baseline (tests/fixtures/_baseline/state.json) + builder (scripts/tests/_try_repo_fixtures.py) + 12/12 round-trip tests passing in 0.08s. Empty-overrides round-trip is byte-identity; deep-merge preserves siblings; list-override replaces wholesale; None-sentinel deletes (for REQUIRED-field omission gates). T3 next: harness scaffold (make_throwaway_repo + run_precommit + scrub_home_env).

T3 SHIPPED — harness scaffold (make_throwaway_repo + run_precommit + scrub_home_env + stage_files + PrecommitResult dataclass). 17/17 tests pass in 2.55s. Q5 mechanism PIVOTED during development: production gates use GATE_COVERAGE_LEDGER as module-level constant (not env var); revised opt-out is GATE_COVERAGE_LEDGER_DISABLED=1 toggle. The Q5 enforcement test caught the original misdesign immediately (caught the contamination, then PASSED on the corrected mechanism). PRD §3.5 updated to reflect reality.

T4a fixtures + tests SHIPPED but BLOCKED on Q6 finding. Q6: scripts/check-state-schema.py:58 hardcodes REPO_ROOT to where the .py file lives; the harness's subprocess-invoked gates resolve REPO_ROOT to canonical FT2 (not the throwaway repo). The fixtures' state.json files exist in the throwaway repo but  looks them up under FT2's REPO_ROOT and silently drops them — 'No state.json files to validate' → gates skip → pre-commit returns 0 (accept) on every positive fixture. F16 caught the bug F14 monkey-patch could not see. Fix-tier follow-up PR: add REPO_ROOT_OVERRIDE env var (~3 lines × 2 files). T4a-d marked status=blocked + tests pytest.mark.skip with reason. T2+T3 tests still pass (29/29). PRD §3.5 Q6 documents the finding + the fix path.
